calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing The Receipt For Deposit Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing The Receipt For Deposit Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-28-2014 Continued To Dec-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deena Zacharin for Douglas Ikegami (Administrator).

Ms. Zacharin stated that she has not filed the receipt for the blocked account yet, that they requested the Mother be appointed as custodian, that Wells Fargo Bank will not open a custodian blocked account and that it is one or the other (a blocked or a custodian account). Ms. Zacharin also stated that they can open a blocked account but that the Administrator will have to remain on for five years and expressed concern about who will petition the Court if the Minor needs access to the funds. The Court stated that perhaps the order for the blocked account could be modified. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to December 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing The Receipt For Deposit Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-14-2014 Continued To Oct-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deena Zacharin for Douglas Ikegami (Administrator).

Ms. Zacharin addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to reimbursement to the Administrator for payments made to Ms. Matsui for case management services pre and post death. Ms. Zacharin also explained that the services provided by Ms. Matsui for the three month period in which no Administrator was appointed were time and cost saving to the Estate, that the plan has always been to divide the tangible personal property, that no one expressed any interest in the jewelry, that it was recently all sold for $4,323.00 which is close to the appraised value and that one Niece has been in touch but has not shown any interest. The Court questioned whether the petition should be amended to advise the Beneficiaries. In addition, Ms. Zacharin stated that they have identified Wells Fargo Bank to deposit the Minor's share into a blocked account and addressed extraordinary fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chin. (Not Reported)

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deena Zacharin for Douglas Ikegami.

The Court stated that it had a chance to review the supplement, that it is leaning to find approximately 75% of the property to be community property and the balance separate property, and asked Counsel to revise the order to find who is going/entitled to take. Ms. Zacharin presented revised proposed orders and stated that there has been no response. The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deena Zacharin for Douglas Ikegami.

The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution was continued to March 11, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Zacharin to provide a supplement setting forth what the distribution dollar amounts would be if treated as community property and what the amounts would be if treated as separate property. Ms. Zacharin stated that she will get an accountant to look into the capital gains issue. The hearing on the Petition for Final Distribution was continued from February 25, 2014 to April 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
